SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA HARMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA RABMAN IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE COURTCALL. DEFENDANT ZACHARY HELD IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE COURTCALL. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT STATE FARM BENITA SELOR AND DOG WALKER MICHAEL JOHNSTON. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARMS, CYNTHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RABMAN, ALEXANDRA HELD, ZACHARY $7,508.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,613.00, COURT AWARDS $2508.38 FOR MEDICAL EXPENSES AND $5000 FOR NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES (PAIN AND SUFFERING AND INCONVENIENCE) DEFENDANT ZACHARY HELD IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BECAUSE HE DOES NOT OWN THE DOG. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HARMS, CYNTHIA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
